translations.fa: و آنچه پیامبر صلی الله علیه و آله در نفسش پنهان می‌دارد از اجتهاد مجتهدان برتر است؛ و بنده فرائض خدا را ادا نمی‌کند تا زمانی که درباره‌اش تعقل کند؛ و همه عابدان به فضل عبادتشان به آنچه عاقل می‌رسد نخواهند رسید.
translations.fr: Et ce que le Prophète (que la paix soit sur lui et sa famille) dissimule en lui-même est supérieur à l'effort des chercheurs ; et un serviteur n'accomplit pas les obligations de Dieu jusqu'à ce qu'il les comprenne avec l'intellect ; et tous les adorateurs n'atteignent pas, dans le mérite de leur dévotion, ce qu'atteint l'homme intelligent.
translations.id: Dan apa yang disembunyikan Nabi (shallallahu alaihi wa alihi) dalam dirinya lebih utama daripada ijtihad para mujtahid; dan seorang hamba tidak menunaikan kewajiban-kewajiban Allah hingga ia memahaminya dengan akal; dan seluruh ahli ibadah tidak akan mencapai, dalam keutamaan ibadah mereka, apa yang dicapai orang berakal.
translations.ru: А то, что Пророк (мир ему и его роду) таит в себе, превосходит усердие усердствующих; и слуга не исполняет обязанности Аллаха, пока не осмыслит их разумом; и все поклоняющиеся не достигают в достоинстве их поклонения того, чего достигает умный человек.
translations.tr: Nebinin (s.a.v.s.) nefsinde gizlediği şey müçtehitlerin içtihadından üstündür; kul, Allah'ın farzlarını ancak O'nu aklettiğinde yerine getirir; tüm abidlerin ibadetlerindeki fazileti, akıllının ulaştığı dereceye ulaşamaz.
translations.ur: اور نبی صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ کا اپنے نفس میں جو کچھ پوشیدہ ہے وہ مجتہدوں کے اجتہاد سے افضل ہے؛ اور بندہ اللہ کے فرائض ادا نہیں کر سکتا جب تک اسے عقل سے نہ سمجھ لے؛ اور تمام عابدوں کی عبادت کی فضیلت میں وہ مقام نہیں جو عاقل کو حاصل ہے۔
translations.zh: 先知（愿主赐其平安及赐福其家人）内心所藏比苦苦追求者的努力更优越；仆人无法履行真主的义务，直到用智力理解这些义务；所有礼拜者在其崇拜的功德上无法达到理智者所达之境界。

translations.bn: আর বিবেকবানরাই উলুল আলবাব যাদের সম্পর্কে আল্লাহ তা'আলা বলেছেন: 'উপদেশ গ্রহণ করে কেবল উলুল আলবাবই।'
translations.de: Und die Verständigen sind diejenigen, die Verstehen besitzen, über die Gott der Erhabene sagte: 'Und nur die Besitzer des Verstands werden sich besinnen.'
translations.en: And the people of intellect, they are those possessing understanding of whom God the Exalted said: 'And none will take heed except those possessing understanding.'
translations.es: Y los inteligentes son los que poseen comprensión de quienes Dios el Exaltado dijo: 'Y no reflexionará sino quienes poseen comprensión.'
translations.fa: و عقلا همان اولوالالبابی هستند که خداوند تعالی فرموده است: «و تذکر نمی‌گیرند مگر اولوالالباب».
translations.fr: Et les gens d'intellect, ce sont ceux qui possèdent l'entendement au sujet desquels Dieu le Très-Haut a dit : 'Et nul ne prend garde, que ceux qui possèdent l'entendement.'
translations.id: Dan orang-orang berakal, mereka adalah ulu al-albab yang Allah Ta'ala firmankan: 'Dan tidak ada yang mengambil pelajaran kecuali ulu al-albab.'
translations.ru: И разумные люди суть обладатели понимания, о которых Аллах Всевышний сказал: «И лишь обладатели понимания образумятся».
translations.tr: Akıllılar ise Allah Teâlâ'nın 'Sadece akıl sahipleri öğüt alır' buyurduğu ulü'l-elbabdır.
translations.ur: اور عقلاء وہ لوگ ہیں جو اولو الالباب ہیں جن کے بارے میں اللہ تعالیٰ نے فرمایا: 'اور نصیحت صرف اولو الالباب ہی قبول کرتے ہیں۔'
translations.zh: 理智者正是真主至高所说"唯有具备理解力者才能铭记"中的具有理解力之人。

diacritics_changes: Added full tashkeel to the Arabic text which had partial diacritization in the source

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ رَفَعَهُ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لِلْعِبَادِ شَيْئاً أَفْضَلَ مِنَ الْعَقْلِ فَنَوْمُ الْعَاقِلِ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ سَهَرِ الْجَاهِلِ وَإِقَامَةُ الْعَاقِلِ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ شُخُوصِ الْجَاهِلِ وَلَا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ نَبِيّاً وَلَا رَسُولًا حَتَّى يَسْتَكْمِلَ الْعَقْلَ وَيَكُونَ عَقْلُهُ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ جَمِيعِ عُقُولِ أُمَّتِهِ وَمَا يُضْمِرُ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ فِي نَفْسِهِ أَفْضَلُ مِنِ اجْتِهَادِ الْمُجْتَهِدِينَ وَمَا أَدَّى الْعَبْدُ فَرَائِضَ اللَّهِ حَتَّى عَقَلَ عَنْهُ وَلَا بَلَغَ جَمِيعُ الْعَابِدِينَ فِي فَضْلِ عِبَادَتِهِمْ مَا بَلَغَ الْعَاقِلُ وَالْعُقَلَاءُ هُمْ أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ الَّذِينَ قَالَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى وَمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ إِلَّا أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ

narrators.ambiguity_note: Generic reference to multiple unnamed companions of al-Kulayni. Common formula in al-Kafi.

narrators.known_identity: Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid al-Barqi (d. 274 AH), author of al-Mahasin

narrators.ambiguity_note: Unnamed companion(s) of Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid. The chain is mursal (raised/disconnected) due to this unnamed link.

narrators.known_identity: Prophet Muhammad ibn Abdillah (SAWW)

key_phrases.phrase_ar: نَوْمُ الْعَاقِلِ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ سَهَرِ الْجَاهِلِ
key_phrases.phrase_en: The sleep of the intelligent is better than the vigil of the ignorant

bn.أولو الألباب: উলুল আলবাব — কুরআনী পরিভাষা যারা সত্যিকার অর্থে ঐশী পথনির্দেশ বোঝেন তাদের জন্য
bn.العقل: বিবেক/আকল — যে শক্তি মানুষকে ঐশী দায়িত্ব বুঝতে সক্ষম করে

de.أولو الألباب: Ulu al-albab — koranischer Begriff für diejenigen, die göttliche Führung wirklich verstehen
de.العقل: Der Verstand/Intellekt — die Fähigkeit, die Menschen ermöglicht, göttliche Pflichten zu verstehen

en.أولو الألباب: Those possessing understanding — Quranic term for those who truly comprehend divine guidance
en.العقل: The intellect/reason — the faculty that enables human beings to understand divine obligations and discern truth
en.سهر الجاهل: The vigil of the ignorant — outward religious effort without intellectual grounding
en.فرائض الله: The obligations of God — religious duties that can only be truly fulfilled through intellectual comprehension
en.يستكمل: To perfect/complete — God perfects the intellect of Prophets and Messengers before their mission

es.أولو الألباب: Ulu al-albab — término coránico para quienes comprenden verdaderamente la guía divina
es.العقل: El intelecto/razón — la facultad que permite a los seres humanos comprender las obligaciones divinas

fa.أولو الألباب: اولوالالباب — اصطلاح قرآنی برای کسانی که واقعاً هدایت الهی را می‌فهمند
fa.العقل: عقل — ملکه‌ای که انسان را قادر می‌سازد تکالیف الهی را بفهمد و حق را تشخیص دهد

fr.أولو الألباب: Ulu al-albab — terme coranique pour ceux qui comprennent véritablement la guidance divine
fr.العقل: L'intellect/raison — la faculté permettant aux êtres humains de comprendre les obligations divines

id.أولو الألباب: Ulu al-albab — istilah Qurani untuk mereka yang benar-benar memahami petunjuk ilahi
id.العقل: Akal — kemampuan yang memungkinkan manusia memahami kewajiban ilahi

ru.أولو الألباب: Улу аль-албаб — коранический термин для тех, кто истинно понимает божественное руководство
ru.العقل: Разум/интеллект — способность, позволяющая людям понимать божественные обязанности

tr.أولو الألباب: Ulü'l-elbab — ilahi rehberliği gerçekten kavrayanlar için Kur'ani terim
tr.العقل: Akıl — insanın ilahi yükümlülükleri anlamasını sağlayan fakülte

ur.أولو الألباب: اولو الالباب — قرآنی اصطلاح ان لوگوں کے لیے جو الٰہی رہنمائی کو واقعی سمجھتے ہیں
ur.العقل: عقل — وہ صلاحیت جو انسان کو الٰہی فرائض سمجھنے اور حق کو پہچاننے کے قابل بناتی ہے

zh.أولو الألباب: 乌鲁·阿尔巴布——古兰经术语，指真正理解神圣指引的人
zh.العقل: 智力/理智——使人能够理解神圣义务的能力

seo_questions.bn: নবী বিবেককে আল্লাহর সর্বশ্রেষ্ঠ দান হিসেবে কেন উল্লেখ করেছেন?
seo_questions.de: Was sagte der Prophet über den Verstand als das größte Geschenk Gottes?
seo_questions.en: What did the Prophet say about the intellect being the greatest gift from God?
seo_questions.es: ¿Qué dijo el Profeta sobre el intelecto como el mayor don de Dios?
seo_questions.fa: پیامبر درباره عقل به عنوان بزرگ‌ترین موهبت خدا چه فرمودند؟
seo_questions.fr: Qu'a dit le Prophète sur l'intellect comme le plus grand don de Dieu ?
seo_questions.id: Apa yang dikatakan Nabi tentang akal sebagai karunia terbesar dari Allah?
seo_questions.ru: Что сказал Пророк о разуме как величайшем даре Аллаха?
seo_questions.tr: Peygamber akıl hakkında ne buyurmuştur?
seo_questions.ur: نبی کریم نے عقل کو اللہ کی طرف سے سب سے بڑا عطیہ کیوں قرار دیا؟
seo_questions.zh: 先知关于智力是真主最伟大礼物说了什么？

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths about the intellect ('aql) being the foundation of all religious obligations, with the Imam declaring that God does not accept the deeds of those who lack intellect.
Narrations comparing the superiority of knowledge-based worship over quantity-based worship, emphasizing understanding over mere ritual performance.
Traditions about the Prophets and Imams possessing perfected intellects that exceed those of all their followers, establishing the theological basis for their authority.

summaries.bn: রাসূলুল্লাহ (সাল্লাল্লাহু আলাইহি ওয়া আলিহি) বিবেককে মানবজাতির প্রতি আল্লাহর সর্বশ্রেষ্ঠ দান হিসেবে প্রশংসা করেছেন যা সমস্ত বাহ্যিক ইবাদত ও সাধনাকে ছাড়িয়ে যায়। এই হাদিসটি শিয়া ধর্মতাত্ত্বিক জোরের প্রেক্ষাপটে বর্ণিত হয়েছে যে বিবেক হলো ধর্মীয় দায়িত্বের ভিত্তি — বিবেক দিয়ে না বুঝলে আল্লাহর কাছে দায়িত্ব পালন করা সম্ভব নয়। কুরআন 13:19-এর উদ্ধৃতি উলুল আলবাবকে তাদের হিসেবে চিহ্নিত করে যারা সত্যিকার অর্থে ঐশী পথনির্দেশ থেকে উপকৃত হয়।
summaries.de: Der Prophet Muhammad (Friede sei mit ihm und seiner Familie) erhöht den Verstand als die größte göttliche Gabe an die Menschheit, die alle äußeren Akte der Anbetung und des Strebens übersteigt. Dieser Hadith wurde im Kontext der schiitischen theologischen Betonung des Verstands als Grundlage religiöser Pflicht überliefert — man kann Gottes Pflichten nicht wahrhaft erfüllen, ohne sie zuerst durch Vernunft zu begreifen. Das Zitat aus dem Koran 13:19 identifiziert die ulu al-albab als diejenigen, die wirklich von der göttlichen Führung profitieren.
summaries.en: The Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family) exalts the intellect ('aql) as the greatest divine gift to humanity, surpassing all outward acts of worship and striving. This hadith was narrated in the context of the Shia theological emphasis on 'aql as the foundation of religious obligation — one cannot fulfill duties to God without first comprehending them through reason. The quotation from Quran 13:19 identifies the people of intellect (ulu al-albab) as those who truly benefit from divine revelation.
summaries.es: El Profeta Muhammad (la paz sea con él y su familia) exalta el intelecto como el mayor don divino a la humanidad, superando todos los actos externos de adoración y esfuerzo. Este hadith fue narrado en el contexto del énfasis teológico chií en el aql como fundamento de la obligación religiosa — no se pueden cumplir los deberes hacia Dios sin antes comprenderlos a través de la razón. La cita del Corán 13:19 identifica a los ulu al-albab como aquellos que realmente se benefician de la guía divina.
summaries.fa: رسول خدا (ص) عقل را بزرگ‌ترین موهبت الهی به انسانیت معرفی می‌کند که از همه اعمال ظاهری عبادت و تلاش برتر است. این حدیث در چارچوب تأکید کلامی شیعه بر عقل به عنوان پایه تکلیف دینی روایت شده است — بدون تعقل، انجام واقعی وظایف الهی ممکن نیست. استناد به آیه 13:19 قرآن، اولوالالباب را کسانی معرفی می‌کند که واقعاً از هدایت الهی بهره می‌برند.
summaries.fr: Le Prophète Muhammad (que la paix soit sur lui et sa famille) exalte l'intellect comme le plus grand don divin à l'humanité, dépassant tous les actes extérieurs d'adoration et d'effort. Ce hadith a été transmis dans le contexte de l'accent théologique chiite sur l'aql comme fondement de l'obligation religieuse — on ne peut véritablement accomplir ses devoirs envers Dieu sans les avoir d'abord compris par la raison. La citation du Coran 13:19 identifie les ulu al-albab comme ceux qui bénéficient véritablement de la guidance divine.
summaries.id: Rasulullah (shallallahu alaihi wa alihi) memuliakan akal sebagai karunia ilahi terbesar bagi umat manusia, melampaui semua amal ibadah dan usaha lahiriah. Hadis ini mencerminkan penekanan teologis Syiah pada akal sebagai landasan kewajiban agama — seseorang tidak dapat benar-benar memenuhi kewajiban kepada Allah tanpa terlebih dahulu memahaminya melalui nalar. Kutipan dari Quran 13:19 mengidentifikasi ulu al-albab sebagai mereka yang benar-benar mengambil manfaat dari petunjuk ilahi.
summaries.ru: Пророк Мухаммад (мир ему и его роду) возвышает разум как величайший дар Аллаха человечеству, превосходящий все внешние акты поклонения и усердия. Этот хадис передан в контексте шиитского теологического акцента на разуме как основе религиозной обязанности — нельзя по-настоящему исполнять обязанности перед Аллахом, не поняв их сначала через разум. Цитата из Корана 13:19 определяет обладателей понимания как тех, кто истинно извлекает пользу из божественного руководства.
summaries.tr: Rasûlullah (s.a.v.s.), aklı Allah'ın insanlığa verdiği en büyük hediye olarak yüceltmiş; aklın dış ibadet ve çabadan üstün olduğunu vurgulamıştır. Bu hadis, Şii teolojisinde aklın dini yükümlülüklerin temeli olarak önemine işaret eder; zira akıl olmadan Allah'ın farzlarını gerçek anlamda yerine getirmek mümkün değildir. Kur'an 13:19'dan yapılan alıntı, ulü'l-elbabı ilahi rehberlikten gerçekten istifade edenler olarak tanımlamaktadır.
summaries.ur: رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ نے عقل کو اللہ کی طرف سے انسانیت کو عطا کردہ سب سے بڑی نعمت قرار دیا جو ظاہری عبادت اور کوشش سے بڑھ کر ہے۔ یہ حدیث شیعہ عقیدے میں عقل کی مرکزیت کو اجاگر کرتی ہے جس کے بغیر دینی فرائض ادا نہیں ہو سکتے۔ قرآن 13:19 کا حوالہ اولو الالباب کو ان لوگوں کے طور پر شناخت کرتا ہے جو واقعی الٰہی ہدایت سے فائدہ اٹھاتے ہیں۔
summaries.zh: 先知穆罕默德（愿主赐其平安及赐福其家人）将智力赞颂为真主赐予人类的最伟大礼物，超越一切外在的礼拜行为和努力。此圣训在什叶派神学强调理智作为宗教义务基础的背景下被传述——没有通过理性理解，就无法真正履行对真主的义务。引用《古兰经》13:19将具有理解力者（أولو الألباب）界定为真正受益于神圣指引的人。

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لِلْعِبَادِ شَيْئاً أَفْضَلَ مِنَ الْعَقْلِ فَنَوْمُ الْعَاقِلِ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ سَهَرِ الْجَاهِلِ وَ إِقَامَةُ الْعَاقِلِ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ شُخُوصِ الْجَاهِلِ وَ لَا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ نَبِيّاً وَ لَا رَسُولًا حَتَّى يَسْتَكْمِلَ الْعَقْلَ وَ يَكُونَ عَقْلُهُ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ جَمِيعِ عُقُولِ أُمَّتِهِ

وَ مَا يُضْمِرُ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي نَفْسِهِ أَفْضَلُ مِنِ اجْتِهَادِ الْمُجْتَهِدِينَ وَ مَا أَدَّى الْعَبْدُ فَرَائِضَ اللَّهِ حَتَّى عَقَلَ عَنْهُ وَ لَا بَلَغَ جَمِيعُ الْعَابِدِينَ فِي فَضْلِ عِبَادَتِهِمْ مَا بَلَغَ الْعَاقِلُ وَ الْعُقَلَاءُ هُمْ أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ الَّذِينَ قَالَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى وَ مَا يَتَذَكَّرُ إِلَّا أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from oe of his companions, raising it, said,

‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has not Distributed for the servants anything more superior than the intellect. Thus, the sleep of the intellectual is superior to the vigil of the ignorant, and the staying (at home) of the intellectual is superior than going out of the ignorant; and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> neither Sent a Prophet<sup>as</sup> nor a Rasool<sup>as</sup> until He<sup>azwj</sup> Perfected the intellect (for him<sup>as</sup>), and his<sup>as</sup> intellect happened to be superior to the entirety of the intellects of the community.

And whatever the Prophetsaww concealed within himselfsaww is superior to the striving of the strivers; and the servant would not fulfil the Obligations of Allahazwj until he knows about Himazwj, and the entirety of the worshippers would not reach in merit with their worshipping what the intellectual would reach; and the intellectuals, they are those possessing understanding whom Allahazwj Speaks of [13:19] But rather, only those possessing understanding will mind’.

translations.bn: said to me Abu al-Hasan Musa son of Ja'far ( upon him be peace ) হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই Allah Blessed be এবং Most High gave glad tidings people of the intellect এবং the understanding মধ্যে His Book so he said so give glad tidings My servants those who they listen the word so they follow the best of it those those who He guided them Allah এবং those they possessors of the minds

translations.en: O! Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla upon m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said and skhr lkm the night and alnhar and the sun and alqmr and alnjwm mskhrat bamrh indeed in that layat for a people they reason and said he/it who/which khlqkm from trab then from ntfh then from 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha and mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken from qbl and ltblghwa an appointed term msma and perhaps you t'qlwn and said indeed in alternation the night and the daytime and what/not sent down Allah from the sky from rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha and tsryf the winds and the clouds almskhr between the sky and the earth layat for a people they reason and said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn and said and jnat from a'nab and zr' and nkhyl snwan and ghyr snwan is watered bma' one and nfdl b'dha 'la b'd in alakl indeed in that layat for a people they reason and said and from His signs He shows you albrq khwfa and tm'a and He sends down from the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha indeed in that layat for a people they reason and said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything and balwaldyn kindness and not you kill your children from poverty we nrzqkm and them (emphasis) and not approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha and what btn and not you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn and said hl for you from what mlkt your oaths from shrka' in what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.es: oh Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla sobre m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he dijo y skhr lkm the night y alnhar y the sun y alqmr y alnjwm mskhrat bamrh ciertamente en that layat for a people they razón y dijo he/it who/which khlqkm de trab then de ntfh then de 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha y mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken de qbl y ltblghwa an appointed term msma y perhaps you t'qlwn y dijo ciertamente en alternation the night y the daytime y what/not sent down Allah de the sky de rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha y tsryf the winds y the clouds almskhr between the sky y the earth layat for a people they razón y dijo gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn y dijo y jnat de a'nab y zr' y nkhyl snwan y ghyr snwan is watered bma' one y nfdl b'dha 'la b'd en alakl ciertamente en that layat for a people they razón y dijo y de His signs He shows you albrq khwfa y tm'a y He sends down de the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha ciertamente en that layat for a people they razón y dijo ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything y balwaldyn kindness y no you kill your children de poverty we nrzqkm y them (emphasis) y no approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha y what btn y no you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn y dijo hl for you de what mlkt your oaths de shrka' en what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason

translations.bn: হে Hisham then admonished people of the intellect এবং rghbhm মধ্যে the Hereafter so he said এবং what/not alhyah worldly life except l'b এবং lhw এবং lldar alakhrh good for those who they fear Allah is? fla t'qlwn হে Hisham then khwf those who না they reason 'qabh so he said Most High then dmrna alakhryn. এবং indeed you (pl) ltmrwn upon them msbhyn. এবং by night is? fla t'qlwn. এবং said indeed We mnzlwn 'la people of hdhh alqryh rjza থেকে the sky bma kanwa they transgress এবং lqd trkna mnha a sign bynh for a people they reason

translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই the intellect with knowledge so he said এবং that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas এবং what he understands them except al'almwn হে Hisham then dhm those who না they reason so he said এবং when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? এবং if/had kan their forefathers না they reason anything এবং না they are guided এবং said এবং mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma না he hears except d'a' এবং nda' sm bkm 'my fhm না they reason এবং said এবং from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf এবং if/had kanwa না they reason এবং said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla এবং said না they fight you jmy'a except মধ্যে qra mhsnh or থেকে behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a এবং their hearts shta that banhm qwm না they reason এবং said এবং tnswn yourselves এবং you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich the intellect with knowledge so he sagte und that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas und what he understands them except al'almwn o Hisham then dhm jene who nicht they reason so he sagte und when it was sagte lhm follow! what sent down Allah they sagte rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? und if/had kan their forefathers nicht they reason anything und nicht they are guided und sagte und mthl jene who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma nicht he hears except d'a' und nda' sm bkm 'my fhm nicht they reason und sagte und from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf und if/had kanwa nicht they reason und sagte or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla und sagte nicht they fight you jmy'a except in qra mhsnh or von behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a und their hearts shta that banhm qwm nicht they reason und sagte und tnswn yourselves und you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn

translations.bn: হে Hisham then mentioned possessors of alalbab bahsn remembrance এবং hlahm bahsn alhlyh so he said He gives wisdom who/whoever He wills এবং who/whoever he is given wisdom then indeed was given good much এবং what he remembers except possessors of the minds এবং said এবং the firmly grounded মধ্যে knowledge they say we believed by it kl থেকে 'nd rbna এবং what he remembers except possessors of the minds এবং said নিশ্চয়ই মধ্যে khlq the heavens এবং the earth এবং alternation the night এবং alnhar layat lawly the minds এবং said is? so whoever knows that only was sent down to you থেকে your Lord alhq kmn he/it blind verily only he reflects possessors of the minds এবং said or who he/it qant hours of the night sajda এবং qa'ma is cautious the Hereafter এবং they hope rhmh his Lord ql hl are equal those who they know এবং those who না they know verily only he reflects possessors of the minds এবং said ktab We sent it down to you mbark lydbrwa His signs এবং lytdhkr possessors of the minds এবং said এবং lqd We gave Musa alhda এবং We made inherit children of Israel alktab hda এবং dhkra lawly the minds এবং said এবং dhkr for indeed the reminder tnf' the Believers

translations.bn: হে Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha উপর thlath fkanma helped উপর hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope এবং mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh এবং extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah উপর hdm his intellect এবং who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh এবং his worldly life হে Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk এবং you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord এবং you obeyed hwak উপর ghlbh 'qlk হে Hisham patience উপর alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life এবং the desirous in it (f) এবং rghb fyma at/near of Allah এবং was Allah his intimacy মধ্যে alwhshh এবং sahbh মধ্যে alwhdh এবং ghnah মধ্যে al'ylh এবং m'zh থেকে other than 'shyrh হে Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah এবং না njah except balta'h এবং obedience by knowledge এবং knowledge balt'lm এবং learning by the intellect is believed এবং না 'lm except থেকে 'alm rbany এবং knowledge knowledge by the intellect হে Hisham qlyl al'ml থেকে al'alm mqbwl mda'f এবং kthyr al'ml থেকে people of desire এবং ignorance mrdwd
translations.de: o Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha auf thlath fkanma helped auf hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope und mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh und extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah auf hdm his intellect und who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh und his worldly life o Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk und you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord und you obeyed hwak auf ghlbh 'qlk o Hisham patience auf alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life und the desirous in it (f) und rghb fyma at/near of Allah und was Allah his intimacy in alwhshh und sahbh in alwhdh und ghnah in al'ylh und m'zh von other than 'shyrh o Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah und nicht njah except balta'h und obedience by knowledge und knowledge balt'lm und learning by the intellect is believed und nicht 'lm except von 'alm rbany und knowledge knowledge by the intellect o Hisham qlyl al'ml von al'alm mqbwl mda'f und kthyr al'ml von people of desire und ignorance mrdwd
translations.en: O! Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha upon thlath fkanma helped upon hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope and mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh and extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah upon hdm his intellect and who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh and his worldly life O! Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk and you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord and you obeyed hwak upon ghlbh 'qlk O! Hisham patience upon alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life and the desirous in it (f) and rghb fyma at/near of Allah and was Allah his intimacy in alwhshh and sahbh in alwhdh and ghnah in al'ylh and m'zh from other than 'shyrh O! Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah and not njah except balta'h and obedience by knowledge and knowledge balt'lm and learning by the intellect is believed and not 'lm except from 'alm rbany and knowledge knowledge by the intellect O! Hisham qlyl al'ml from al'alm mqbwl mda'f and kthyr al'ml from people of desire and ignorance mrdwd

translations.ur: اے Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha پر thlath fkanma helped پر hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope اور mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh اور extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah پر hdm his intellect اور who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh اور his worldly life اے Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk اور you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord اور you obeyed hwak پر ghlbh 'qlk اے Hisham patience پر alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life اور the desirous in it (f) اور rghb fyma at/near of Allah اور was Allah his intimacy میں alwhshh اور sahbh میں alwhdh اور ghnah میں al'ylh اور m'zh سے other than 'shyrh اے Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah اور نہیں njah except balta'h اور obedience by knowledge اور knowledge balt'lm اور learning by the intellect is believed اور نہیں 'lm except سے 'alm rbany اور knowledge knowledge by the intellect اے Hisham qlyl al'ml سے al'alm mqbwl mda'f اور kthyr al'ml سے people of desire اور ignorance mrdwd
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham who/whoever slt thlatha 在...上 thlath fkanma helped 在...上 hdm his intellect who/whoever more unjust light of tfkrh btwl his hope 和 mha tra'f hkmth bfdwl klamh 和 extinguished nwr 'brth bshhwat himself fkanma helped hwah 在...上 hdm his intellect 和 who/whoever hdm his intellect corrupted upon him dynh 和 his worldly life 啊 Hisham how grows/purifies at/near of Allah 'mlk 和 you indeed/already shghlt qlbk from matter your Lord 和 you obeyed hwak 在...上 ghlbh 'qlk 啊 Hisham patience 在...上 alwhdh 'lamh qwh the intellect so whoever 'ql from/about of Allah withdrew people of the worldly life 和 the desirous in it (f) 和 rghb fyma at/near of Allah 和 was Allah his intimacy 在 alwhshh 和 sahbh 在 alwhdh 和 ghnah 在 al'ylh 和 m'zh 从 other than 'shyrh 啊 Hisham nsb the truth lta'h of Allah 和 不 njah except balta'h 和 obedience by knowledge 和 knowledge balt'lm 和 learning by the intellect is believed 和 不 'lm except 从 'alm rbany 和 knowledge knowledge by the intellect 啊 Hisham qlyl al'ml 从 al'alm mqbwl mda'f 和 kthyr al'ml 从 people of desire 和 ignorance mrdwd

translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'aql was pleased baldwn থেকে the worldly life with wisdom এবং did not is pleased baldwn থেকে wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins এবং trk the worldly life থেকে alfdl এবং trk sins থেকে alfrd হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'aql nzr দিকে the worldly life এবং দিকে its people f'lm that she/it না tnal except balmshqh এবং nzr দিকে the Hereafter f'lm that she/it না tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'qla' zhdwa মধ্যে the worldly life এবং rghbwa মধ্যে the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh এবং the Hereafter talbh এবং mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh এবং who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life এবং his Hereafter হে Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal এবং rahh the heart থেকে alhsd এবং safety মধ্যে the religion flytdr' দিকে of Allah 'z এবং jl মধ্যে msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him এবং who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient এবং who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich al'aql was pleased baldwn von the worldly life with wisdom und did not is pleased baldwn von wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm o Hisham wahrlich al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins und trk the worldly life von alfdl und trk sins von alfrd o Hisham wahrlich al'aql nzr zu the worldly life und zu its people f'lm that she/it nicht tnal except balmshqh und nzr zu the Hereafter f'lm that she/it nicht tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting o Hisham wahrlich al'qla' zhdwa in the worldly life und rghbwa in the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh und the Hereafter talbh und mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh und who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life und his Hereafter o Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal und rahh the heart von alhsd und safety in the religion flytdr' zu of Allah 'z und jl in msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him und who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient und who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.en: O! Hisham indeed al'aql was pleased baldwn from the worldly life with wisdom and did not is pleased baldwn from wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm O! Hisham indeed al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins and trk the worldly life from alfdl and trk sins from alfrd O! Hisham indeed al'aql nzr to the worldly life and to its people f'lm that she/it not tnal except balmshqh and nzr to the Hereafter f'lm that she/it not tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting O! Hisham indeed al'qla' zhdwa in the worldly life and rghbwa in the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh and the Hereafter talbh and mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh and who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life and his Hereafter O! Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal and rahh the heart from alhsd and safety in the religion flytdr' to of Allah 'z and jl in msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him and who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient and who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.es: oh Hisham ciertamente al'aql was pleased baldwn de the worldly life with wisdom y did not is pleased baldwn de wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm oh Hisham ciertamente al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins y trk the worldly life de alfdl y trk sins de alfrd oh Hisham ciertamente al'aql nzr hacia the worldly life y hacia its people f'lm that she/it no tnal except balmshqh y nzr hacia the Hereafter f'lm that she/it no tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting oh Hisham ciertamente al'qla' zhdwa en the worldly life y rghbwa en the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh y the Hereafter talbh y mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh y who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life y his Hereafter oh Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal y rahh the heart de alhsd y safety en the religion flytdr' hacia of Allah 'z y jl en msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him y who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient y who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.fa: ای Hisham به درستی al'aql was pleased baldwn از the worldly life with wisdom و did not is pleased baldwn از wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm ای Hisham به درستی al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins و trk the worldly life از alfdl و trk sins از alfrd ای Hisham به درستی al'aql nzr به سوی the worldly life و به سوی its people f'lm that she/it نه tnal except balmshqh و nzr به سوی the Hereafter f'lm that she/it نه tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting ای Hisham به درستی al'qla' zhdwa در the worldly life و rghbwa در the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh و the Hereafter talbh و mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh و who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life و his Hereafter ای Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal و rahh the heart از alhsd و safety در the religion flytdr' به سوی of Allah 'z و jl در msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him و who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient و who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever

translations.ru: о Hisham поистине al'aql was pleased baldwn из the worldly life with wisdom и did not is pleased baldwn из wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm о Hisham поистине al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins и trk the worldly life из alfdl и trk sins из alfrd о Hisham поистине al'aql nzr к the worldly life и к its people f'lm that she/it не tnal except balmshqh и nzr к the Hereafter f'lm that she/it не tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting о Hisham поистине al'qla' zhdwa в the worldly life и rghbwa в the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh и the Hereafter talbh и mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh и who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life и his Hereafter о Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal и rahh the heart из alhsd и safety в the religion flytdr' к of Allah 'z и jl в msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him и who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient и who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.tr: ey Hisham muhakkak al'aql was pleased baldwn -den the worldly life with wisdom ve did not is pleased baldwn -den wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm ey Hisham muhakkak al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins ve trk the worldly life -den alfdl ve trk sins -den alfrd ey Hisham muhakkak al'aql nzr -e the worldly life ve -e its people f'lm that she/it değil tnal except balmshqh ve nzr -e the Hereafter f'lm that she/it değil tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting ey Hisham muhakkak al'qla' zhdwa içinde the worldly life ve rghbwa içinde the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh ve the Hereafter talbh ve mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh ve who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life ve his Hereafter ey Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal ve rahh the heart -den alhsd ve safety içinde the religion flytdr' -e of Allah 'z ve jl içinde msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him ve who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient ve who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.ur: اے Hisham بے شک al'aql was pleased baldwn سے the worldly life with wisdom اور did not is pleased baldwn سے wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm اے Hisham بے شک al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins اور trk the worldly life سے alfdl اور trk sins سے alfrd اے Hisham بے شک al'aql nzr طرف the worldly life اور طرف its people f'lm that she/it نہیں tnal except balmshqh اور nzr طرف the Hereafter f'lm that she/it نہیں tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting اے Hisham بے شک al'qla' zhdwa میں the worldly life اور rghbwa میں the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh اور the Hereafter talbh اور mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh اور who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life اور his Hereafter اے Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal اور rahh the heart سے alhsd اور safety میں the religion flytdr' طرف of Allah 'z اور jl میں msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him اور who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient اور who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 al'aql was pleased baldwn 从 the worldly life with wisdom 和 did not is pleased baldwn 从 wisdom with the worldly life fldhlk rbht tjarthm 啊 Hisham 确实 al'qla' trkwa fdwl the worldly life fkyf sins 和 trk the worldly life 从 alfdl 和 trk sins 从 alfrd 啊 Hisham 确实 al'aql nzr 向 the worldly life 和 向 its people f'lm that she/it 不 tnal except balmshqh 和 nzr 向 the Hereafter f'lm that she/it 不 tnal except balmshqh ftlb balmshqh more lasting 啊 Hisham 确实 al'qla' zhdwa 在 the worldly life 和 rghbwa 在 the Hereafter lanhm they knew that the worldly life talbh mtlwbh 和 the Hereafter talbh 和 mtlwbh so whoever sought the Hereafter tlbth the worldly life until he completes from it (f) rzqh 和 who/whoever sought the worldly life tlbth alakhrh fyatyh almwt fyfsd upon him his worldly life 和 his Hereafter 啊 Hisham who/whoever intended alghna bla mal 和 rahh the heart 从 alhsd 和 safety 在 the religion flytdr' 向 of Allah 'z 和 jl 在 msalth ban completes his intellect so whoever 'ql qn' with what suffices him 和 who/whoever qn' with what suffices him was self-sufficient 和 who/whoever did not is content with what suffices him did not comprehends alghna ever

translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna না tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna এবং hb lna থেকে ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh এবং t'wd দিকে 'maha এবং rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah এবং who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart উপর m'rfh thabth he sees it এবং he finds hqyqtha মধ্যে his heart এবং না is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa এবং srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate উপর albatn alkhfy থেকে the intellect except bzahr from it এবং natq from him হে Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous থেকে the intellect এবং what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr এবং evil from it mamwnan এবং right guidance এবং alkhyr from it mamwlan এবং fdl his wealth mbdhwl এবং fdl His saying mkfwf এবং nsybh থেকে the worldly life alqwt না is satiated থেকে knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah থেকে might with ghyrh এবং humility more beloved to him থেকে honor considers much little alm'rwf থেকে ghyrh এবং considers little kthyr alm'rwf থেকে himself এবং he sees the people klhm good from it এবং that he/it shrhm মধ্যে himself এবং he/it tmam alamr
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna nicht tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna und hb lna von ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh und t'wd zu 'maha und rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah und who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart auf m'rfh thabth he sees it und he finds hqyqtha in his heart und nicht is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa und srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate auf albatn alkhfy von the intellect except bzahr from it und natq from him o Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous von the intellect und what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr und evil from it mamwnan und right guidance und alkhyr from it mamwlan und fdl his wealth mbdhwl und fdl His saying mkfwf und nsybh von the worldly life alqwt nicht is satiated von knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah von might with ghyrh und humility more beloved to him von honor considers much little alm'rwf von ghyrh und considers little kthyr alm'rwf von himself und he sees the people klhm good from it und that he/it shrhm in himself und he/it tmam alamr
translations.en: O! Hisham indeed Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna not tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna and hb lna from ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh and t'wd to 'maha and rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah and who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart upon m'rfh thabth he sees it and he finds hqyqtha in his heart and not is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa and srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate upon albatn alkhfy from the intellect except bzahr from it and natq from him O! Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous from the intellect and what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr and evil from it mamwnan and right guidance and alkhyr from it mamwlan and fdl his wealth mbdhwl and fdl His saying mkfwf and nsybh from the worldly life alqwt not is satiated from knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah from might with ghyrh and humility more beloved to him from honor considers much little alm'rwf from ghyrh and considers little kthyr alm'rwf from himself and he sees the people klhm good from it and that he/it shrhm in himself and he/it tmam alamr

translations.ru: о Hisham поистине Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna не tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna и hb lna из ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh и t'wd к 'maha и rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah и who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart на m'rfh thabth he sees it и he finds hqyqtha в his heart и не is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa и srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate на albatn alkhfy из the intellect except bzahr from it и natq from him о Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous из the intellect и what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr и evil from it mamwnan и right guidance и alkhyr from it mamwlan и fdl his wealth mbdhwl и fdl His saying mkfwf и nsybh из the worldly life alqwt не is satiated из knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah из might with ghyrh и humility more beloved to him из honor considers much little alm'rwf из ghyrh и considers little kthyr alm'rwf из himself и he sees the people klhm good from it и that he/it shrhm в himself и he/it tmam alamr
translations.tr: ey Hisham muhakkak Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna değil tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna ve hb lna -den ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh ve t'wd -e 'maha ve rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah ve who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart üzerine m'rfh thabth he sees it ve he finds hqyqtha içinde his heart ve değil is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa ve srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate üzerine albatn alkhfy -den the intellect except bzahr from it ve natq from him ey Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous -den the intellect ve what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr ve evil from it mamwnan ve right guidance ve alkhyr from it mamwlan ve fdl his wealth mbdhwl ve fdl His saying mkfwf ve nsybh -den the worldly life alqwt değil is satiated -den knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah -den might with ghyrh ve humility more beloved to him -den honor considers much little alm'rwf -den ghyrh ve considers little kthyr alm'rwf -den himself ve he sees the people klhm good from it ve that he/it shrhm içinde himself ve he/it tmam alamr
translations.ur: اے Hisham بے شک Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna نہیں tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna اور hb lna سے ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh اور t'wd طرف 'maha اور rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah اور who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart پر m'rfh thabth he sees it اور he finds hqyqtha میں his heart اور نہیں is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa اور srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate پر albatn alkhfy سے the intellect except bzahr from it اور natq from him اے Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous سے the intellect اور what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr اور evil from it mamwnan اور right guidance اور alkhyr from it mamwlan اور fdl his wealth mbdhwl اور fdl His saying mkfwf اور nsybh سے the worldly life alqwt نہیں is satiated سے knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah سے might with ghyrh اور humility more beloved to him سے honor considers much little alm'rwf سے ghyrh اور considers little kthyr alm'rwf سے himself اور he sees the people klhm good from it اور that he/it shrhm میں himself اور he/it tmam alamr
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna 不 tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna 和 hb lna 从 ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh 和 t'wd 向 'maha 和 rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah 和 who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart 在...上 m'rfh thabth he sees it 和 he finds hqyqtha 在 his heart 和 不 is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa 和 srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate 在...上 albatn alkhfy 从 the intellect except bzahr from it 和 natq from him 啊 Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous 从 the intellect 和 what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr 和 evil from it mamwnan 和 right guidance 和 alkhyr from it mamwlan 和 fdl his wealth mbdhwl 和 fdl His saying mkfwf 和 nsybh 从 the worldly life alqwt 不 is satiated 从 knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah 从 might with ghyrh 和 humility more beloved to him 从 honor considers much little alm'rwf 从 ghyrh 和 considers little kthyr alm'rwf 从 himself 和 he sees the people klhm good from it 和 that he/it shrhm 在 himself 和 he/it tmam alamr

translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'aql না lies এবং if was in it hwah হে Hisham না dyn for whoever না mrwh for him এবং না mrwh for whoever না intellect for him এবং নিশ্চয়ই greatest the people qdra who/which না he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed নিশ্চয়ই your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says নিশ্চয়ই থেকে 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l এবং speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam এবং points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it থেকে this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish নিশ্চয়ই Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said না sits মধ্যে sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish এবং said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha থেকে its people it was said হে son of rswl of Allah এবং who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah মধ্যে His Book এবং dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl এবং said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh দিকে rectitude এবং etiquettes the scholars zyadh মধ্যে the intellect এবং ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might এবং cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity এবং guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing এবং kf aladha থেকে kmal the intellect এবং in it rahh albdn 'ajla এবং immediately
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich al'aql nicht lies und if was in it hwah o Hisham nicht dyn for whoever nicht mrwh for him und nicht mrwh for whoever nicht intellect for him und wahrlich greatest the people qdra who/which nicht he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed wahrlich your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha o Hisham wahrlich Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says wahrlich von 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l und speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam und points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it von this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish wahrlich Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) sagte nicht sits in sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish und sagte al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha von its people it was sagte o son of rswl of Allah und who/whoever its people sagte jene who qs Allah in His Book und dhkrhm so he sagte verily only he reflects possessors of the minds sagte they possessors of al'qwl und sagte Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh zu rectitude und etiquettes the scholars zyadh in the intellect und ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might und cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity und guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing und kf aladha von kmal the intellect und in it rahh albdn 'ajla und immediately
translations.en: O! Hisham indeed al'aql not lies and if was in it hwah O! Hisham not dyn for whoever not mrwh for him and not mrwh for whoever not intellect for him and indeed greatest the people qdra who/which not he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed indeed your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha O! Hisham indeed Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says indeed from 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l and speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam and points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it from this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish indeed Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said not sits in sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish and said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha from its people it was said O! son of rswl of Allah and who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah in His Book and dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl and said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh to rectitude and etiquettes the scholars zyadh in the intellect and ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might and cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity and guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing and kf aladha from kmal the intellect and in it rahh albdn 'ajla and immediately
translations.es: oh Hisham ciertamente al'aql no lies y if was in it hwah oh Hisham no dyn for whoever no mrwh for him y no mrwh for whoever no intellect for him y ciertamente greatest the people qdra who/which no he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed ciertamente your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha oh Hisham ciertamente Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he dice ciertamente de 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l y speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam y points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it de this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish ciertamente Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) dijo no sits en sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish y dijo al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha de its people it was dijo oh son of rswl of Allah y who/whoever its people dijo aquéllos who qs Allah en His Book y dhkrhm so he dijo verily only he reflects possessors of the minds dijo they possessors of al'qwl y dijo Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh hacia rectitude y etiquettes the scholars zyadh en the intellect y ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might y cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity y guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing y kf aladha de kmal the intellect y in it rahh albdn 'ajla y immediately
translations.fa: ای Hisham به درستی al'aql نه lies و if was in it hwah ای Hisham نه dyn for whoever نه mrwh for him و نه mrwh for whoever نه intellect for him و به درستی greatest the people qdra who/which نه he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed به درستی your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha ای Hisham به درستی Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says به درستی از 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l و speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam و points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it از this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish به درستی Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said نه sits در sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish و said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha از its people it was said ای son of rswl of Allah و who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah در His Book و dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl و said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh به سوی rectitude و etiquettes the scholars zyadh در the intellect و ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might و cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity و guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing و kf aladha از kmal the intellect و in it rahh albdn 'ajla و immediately

translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 al'aql 不 lies 和 if was in it hwah 啊 Hisham 不 dyn for whoever 不 mrwh for him 和 不 mrwh for whoever 不 intellect for him 和 确实 greatest the people qdra who/which 不 he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed 确实 your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha 啊 Hisham 确实 Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says 确实 从 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l 和 speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam 和 points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it 从 this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish 确实 Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said 不 sits 在 sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish 和 said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha 从 its people it was said 啊 son of rswl of Allah 和 who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah 在 His Book 和 dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl 和 said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh 向 rectitude 和 etiquettes the scholars zyadh 在 the intellect 和 ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might 和 cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity 和 guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing 和 kf aladha 从 kmal the intellect 和 in it rahh albdn 'ajla 和 immediately

translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'aql না narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh এবং না asks who/whoever fears mn'h এবং না promises what/not না he is able upon him এবং না hopes what/not is reproached brja'h এবং না advances উপর what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich al'aql nicht narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh und nicht asks who/whoever fears mn'h und nicht promises what/not nicht he is able upon him und nicht hopes what/not is reproached brja'h und nicht advances auf what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.en: O! Hisham indeed al'aql not narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh and not asks who/whoever fears mn'h and not promises what/not not he is able upon him and not hopes what/not is reproached brja'h and not advances upon what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.es: oh Hisham ciertamente al'aql no narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh y no asks who/whoever fears mn'h y no promises what/not no he is able upon him y no hopes what/not is reproached brja'h y no advances sobre what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.fa: ای Hisham به درستی al'aql نه narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh و نه asks who/whoever fears mn'h و نه promises what/not نه he is able upon him و نه hopes what/not is reproached brja'h و نه advances بر what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.fr: ô Hisham certes al'aql non narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh et non asks who/whoever fears mn'h et non promises what/not non he is able upon him et non hopes what/not is reproached brja'h et non advances sur what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.id: wahai Hisham sesungguhnya al'aql tidak narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh dan tidak asks who/whoever fears mn'h dan tidak promises what/not tidak he is able upon him dan tidak hopes what/not is reproached brja'h dan tidak advances atas what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.ru: о Hisham поистине al'aql не narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh и не asks who/whoever fears mn'h и не promises what/not не he is able upon him и не hopes what/not is reproached brja'h и не advances на what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.tr: ey Hisham muhakkak al'aql değil narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh ve değil asks who/whoever fears mn'h ve değil promises what/not değil he is able upon him ve değil hopes what/not is reproached brja'h ve değil advances üzerine what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.ur: اے Hisham بے شک al'aql نہیں narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh اور نہیں asks who/whoever fears mn'h اور نہیں promises what/not نہیں he is able upon him اور نہیں hopes what/not is reproached brja'h اور نہیں advances پر what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 al'aql 不 narrates who/whoever fears tkdhybh 和 不 asks who/whoever fears mn'h 和 不 promises what/not 不 he is able upon him 和 不 hopes what/not is reproached brja'h 和 不 advances 在...上 what/not fears fwth bal'jz from him .

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ لِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام )
isnad_matn.matn_ar: يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى بَشَّرَ أَهْلَ الْعَقْلِ وَ الْفَهْمِ فِي كِتَابِهِ فَقَالَ فَبَشِّرْ عِبادِ الَّذِينَ يَسْتَمِعُونَ الْقَوْلَ فَيَتَّبِعُونَ أَحْسَنَهُ أُولئِكَ الَّذِينَ هَداهُمُ اللَّهُ وَ أُولئِكَ هُمْ أُولُوا الْأَلْبابِ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى أَكْمَلَ لِلنَّاسِ الْحُجَجَ بِالْعُقُولِ وَ نَصَرَ النَّبِيِّينَ بِالْبَيَانِ وَ دَلَّهُمْ عَلَى رُبُوبِيَّتِهِ بِالْأَدِلَّةِ فَقَالَ وَ إِلهُكُمْ إِلهٌ واحِدٌ لا إِلهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الرَّحْمنُ الرَّحِيمُ. إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّماواتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ وَ اخْتِلافِ اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهارِ وَ الْفُلْكِ الَّتِي تَجْرِي فِي الْبَحْرِ بِما يَنْفَعُ النَّاسَ وَ ما أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ مِنَ السَّماءِ مِنْ ماءٍ فَأَحْيا بِهِ الْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِها وَ بَثَّ فِيها مِنْ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ وَ تَصْرِيفِ الرِّياحِ وَ السَّحابِ الْمُسَخَّرِ بَيْنَ السَّماءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ يَا هِشَامُ قَدْ جَعَلَ اللَّهُ ذَلِكَ دَلِيلًا عَلَى مَعْرِفَتِهِ بِأَنَّ لَهُمْ مُدَبِّراً فَقَالَ وَ سَخَّرَ لَكُمُ اللَّيْلَ وَ النَّهارَ وَ الشَّمْسَ وَ الْقَمَرَ وَ النُّجُومُ مُسَخَّراتٌ بِأَمْرِهِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ هُوَ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ مِنْ تُرابٍ ثُمَّ مِنْ نُطْفَةٍ ثُمَّ مِنْ عَلَقَةٍ ثُمَّ يُخْرِجُكُمْ طِفْلًا ثُمَّ لِتَبْلُغُوا أَشُدَّكُمْ ثُمَّ لِتَكُونُوا شُيُوخاً وَ مِنْكُمْ مَنْ يُتَوَفَّى مِنْ قَبْلُ وَ لِتَبْلُغُوا أَجَلًا مُسَمًّى وَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ إِنَّ فِي اخْتِلَافِ اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهَارِ وَ مَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مِنْ رِزْقٍ فَأَحْيَا بِهِ الْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا وَ تَصْرِيفِ الرِّيَاحِ وَ السَّحَابِ الْمُسَخَّرِ بَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ لآَيَاتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ يُحْيِ الْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِها قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ الْآياتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ جَنَّاتٌ مِنْ أَعْنابٍ وَ زَرْعٌ وَ نَخِيلٌ صِنْوانٌ وَ غَيْرُ صِنْوانٍ يُسْقى بِماءٍ واحِدٍ وَ نُفَضِّلُ بَعْضَها عَلى بَعْضٍ فِي الْأُكُلِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ مِنْ آياتِهِ يُرِيكُمُ الْبَرْقَ خَوْفاً وَ طَمَعاً وَ يُنَزِّلُ مِنَ السَّماءِ ماءً فَيُحْيِي بِهِ الْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِها إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ قُلْ تَعالَوْا أَتْلُ ما حَرَّمَ رَبُّكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ أَلَّا تُشْرِكُوا بِهِ شَيْئاً وَ بِالْوالِدَيْنِ إِحْساناً وَ لا تَقْتُلُوا أَوْلادَكُمْ مِنْ إِمْلاقٍ نَحْنُ نَرْزُقُكُمْ وَ إِيَّاهُمْ وَ لا تَقْرَبُوا الْفَواحِشَ ما ظَهَرَ مِنْها وَ ما بَطَنَ وَ لا تَقْتُلُوا النَّفْسَ الَّتِي حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ ذلِكُمْ وَصَّاكُمْ بِهِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ هَلْ لَكُمْ مِنْ ما مَلَكَتْ أَيْمانُكُمْ مِنْ شُرَكاءَ فِي ما رَزَقْناكُمْ فَأَنْتُمْ فِيهِ سَواءٌ تَخافُونَهُمْ كَخِيفَتِكُمْ أَنْفُسَكُمْ كَذلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ الْآياتِ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ يَا هِشَامُ ثُمَّ وَعَظَ أَهْلَ الْعَقْلِ وَ رَغَّبَهُمْ فِي الْآخِرَةِ فَقَالَ وَ مَا الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا إِلَّا لَعِبٌ وَ لَهْوٌ وَ لَلدَّارُ الْآخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ لِلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَ أَ فَلا تَعْقِلُونَ يَا هِشَامُ ثُمَّ خَوَّفَ الَّذِينَ لَا يَعْقِلُونَ عِقَابَهُ فَقَالَ تَعَالَى ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا الْآخَرِينَ. وَ إِنَّكُمْ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيْهِمْ مُصْبِحِينَ. وَ بِاللَّيْلِ أَ فَلا تَعْقِلُونَ. وَ قَالَ إِنَّا مُنْزِلُونَ عَلى أَهْلِ هذِهِ الْقَرْيَةِ رِجْزاً مِنَ السَّماءِ بِما كانُوا يَفْسُقُونَ وَ لَقَدْ تَرَكْنا مِنْها آيَةً بَيِّنَةً لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعَقْلَ مَعَ الْعِلْمِ فَقَالَ وَ تِلْكَ الْأَمْثالُ نَضْرِبُها لِلنَّاسِ وَ ما يَعْقِلُها إِلَّا الْعالِمُونَ يَا هِشَامُ ثُمَّ ذَمَّ الَّذِينَ لَا يَعْقِلُونَ فَقَالَ وَ إِذا قِيلَ لَهُمُ اتَّبِعُوا ما أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ قالُوا بَلْ نَتَّبِعُ ما أَلْفَيْنا عَلَيْهِ آباءَنا أَ وَ لَوْ كانَ آباؤُهُمْ لا يَعْقِلُونَ شَيْئاً وَ لا يَهْتَدُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا كَمَثَلِ الَّذِي يَنْعِقُ بِما لا يَسْمَعُ إِلَّا دُعاءً وَ نِداءً صُمٌّ بُكْمٌ عُمْيٌ فَهُمْ لا يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَسْتَمِعُ إِلَيْكَ أَ فَأَنْتَ تُسْمِعُ الصُّمَّ وَ لَوْ كانُوا لا يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ أَمْ تَحْسَبُ أَنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ يَسْمَعُونَ أَوْ يَعْقِلُونَ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا كَالْأَنْعامِ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا وَ قَالَ لا يُقاتِلُونَكُمْ جَمِيعاً إِلَّا فِي قُرىً مُحَصَّنَةٍ أَوْ مِنْ وَراءِ جُدُرٍ بَأْسُهُمْ بَيْنَهُمْ شَدِيدٌ تَحْسَبُهُمْ جَمِيعاً وَ قُلُوبُهُمْ شَتَّى ذلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لا يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ تَنْسَوْنَ أَنْفُسَكُمْ وَ أَنْتُمْ تَتْلُونَ الْكِتابَ أَ فَلا تَعْقِلُونَ يَا هِشَامُ ثُمَّ ذَمَّ اللَّهُ الْكَثْرَةَ فَقَالَ وَ إِنْ تُطِعْ أَكْثَرَ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ يُضِلُّوكَ عَنْ سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَ قَالَ وَ لَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ السَّماواتِ وَ الْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّهُ قُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لا يَعْلَمُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ لَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ نَزَّلَ مِنَ السَّماءِ ماءً فَأَحْيا بِهِ الْأَرْضَ مِنْ بَعْدِ مَوْتِها لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّهُ قُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لا يَعْقِلُونَ يَا هِشَامُ ثُمَّ مَدَحَ الْقِلَّةَ فَقَالَ وَ قَلِيلٌ مِنْ عِبادِيَ الشَّكُورُ وَ قَالَ وَ قَلِيلٌ ما هُمْ وَ قالَ رَجُلٌ مُؤْمِنٌ مِنْ آلِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَكْتُمُ إِيمانَهُ أَ تَقْتُلُونَ رَجُلًا أَنْ يَقُولَ رَبِّيَ اللَّهُ وَ قَالَ وَ مَنْ آمَنَ وَ ما آمَنَ مَعَهُ إِلَّا قَلِيلٌ وَ قَالَ وَ لكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لا يَعْلَمُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لا يَعْقِلُونَ وَ قَالَ وَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ يَا هِشَامُ ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ أُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ بِأَحْسَنِ الذِّكْرِ وَ حَلَّاهُمْ بِأَحْسَنِ الْحِلْيَةِ فَقَالَ يُؤْتِي الْحِكْمَةَ مَنْ يَشاءُ وَ مَنْ يُؤْتَ الْحِكْمَةَ فَقَدْ أُوتِيَ خَيْراً كَثِيراً وَ ما يَذَّكَّرُ إِلَّا أُولُوا الْأَلْبابِ وَ قَالَ وَ الرَّاسِخُونَ فِي الْعِلْمِ يَقُولُونَ آمَنَّا بِهِ كُلٌّ مِنْ عِنْدِ رَبِّنا وَ ما يَذَّكَّرُ إِلَّا أُولُوا الْأَلْبابِ وَ قَالَ إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّماواتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ وَ اخْتِلافِ اللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهارِ لَآياتٍ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبابِ وَ قَالَ أَ فَمَنْ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّما أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ رَبِّكَ الْحَقُّ كَمَنْ هُوَ أَعْمى إِنَّما يَتَذَكَّرُ أُولُوا الْأَلْبابِ وَ قَالَ أَمَّنْ هُوَ قانِتٌ آناءَ اللَّيْلِ ساجِداً وَ قائِماً يَحْذَرُ الْآخِرَةَ وَ يَرْجُوا رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِي الَّذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَ الَّذِينَ لا يَعْلَمُونَ إِنَّما يَتَذَكَّرُ أُولُوا الْأَلْبابِ وَ قَالَ كِتابٌ أَنْزَلْناهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبارَكٌ لِيَدَّبَّرُوا آياتِهِ وَ لِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُولُوا الْأَلْبابِ وَ قَالَ وَ لَقَدْ آتَيْنا مُوسَى الْهُدى وَ أَوْرَثْنا بَنِي إِسْرائِيلَ الْكِتابَ هُدىً وَ ذِكْرى لِأُولِي الْأَلْبابِ وَ قَالَ وَ ذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرى تَنْفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى يَقُولُ فِي كِتَابِهِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَذِكْرى لِمَنْ كانَ لَهُ قَلْبٌ يَعْنِي عَقْلٌ وَ قَالَ وَ لَقَدْ آتَيْنا لُقْمانَ الْحِكْمَةَ قَالَ الْفَهْمَ وَ الْعَقْلَ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ لُقْمَانَ قَالَ لِابْنِهِ تَوَاضَعْ لِلْحَقِّ تَكُنْ أَعْقَلَ النَّاسِ وَ إِنَّ الْكَيِّسَ لَدَى الْحَقِّ يَسِيرٌ يَا بُنَيَّ إِنَّ الدُّنْيَا بَحْرٌ عَمِيقٌ قَدْ غَرِقَ فِيهَا عَالَمٌ كَثِيرٌ فَلْتَكُنْ سَفِينَتُكَ فِيهَا تَقْوَى اللَّهِ وَ حَشْوُهَا الْإِيمَانَ وَ شِرَاعُهَا التَّوَكُّلَ وَ قَيِّمُهَا الْعَقْلَ وَ دَلِيلُهَا الْعِلْمَ وَ سُكَّانُهَا الصَّبْرَ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ لِكُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ دَلِيلًا وَ دَلِيلُ الْعَقْلِ التَّفَكُّرُ وَ دَلِيلُ التَّفَكُّرِ الصَّمْتُ وَ لِكُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ مَطِيَّةً وَ مَطِيَّةُ الْعَقْلِ التَّوَاضُعُ وَ كَفَى بِكَ جَهْلًا أَنْ تَرْكَبَ مَا نُهِيْتَ عَنْهُ يَا هِشَامُ مَا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ أَنْبِيَاءَهُ وَ رُسُلَهُ إِلَى عِبَادِهِ إِلَّا لِيَعْقِلُوا عَنِ اللَّهِ فَأَحْسَنُهُمُ اسْتِجَابَةً أَحْسَنُهُمْ مَعْرِفَةً وَ أَعْلَمُهُمْ بِأَمْرِ اللَّهِ أَحْسَنُهُمْ عَقْلًا وَ أَكْمَلُهُمْ عَقْلًا أَرْفَعُهُمْ دَرَجَةً فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ لِلَّهِ عَلَى النَّاسِ حُجَّتَيْنِ حُجَّةً ظَاهِرَةً وَ حُجَّةً بَاطِنَةً فَأَمَّا الظَّاهِرَةُ فَالرُّسُلُ وَ الْأَنْبِيَاءُ وَ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) وَ أَمَّا الْبَاطِنَةُ فَالْعُقُولُ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعَاقِلَ الَّذِي لَا يَشْغَلُ الْحَلَالُ شُكْرَهُ وَ لَا يَغْلِبُ الْحَرَامُ صَبْرَهُ يَا هِشَامُ مَنْ سَلَّطَ ثَلَاثاً عَلَى ثَلَاثٍ فَكَأَنَّمَا أَعَانَ عَلَى هَدْمِ عَقْلِهِ مَنْ أَظْلَمَ نُورُ تَفَكُّرِهِ بِطُولِ أَمَلِهِ وَ مَحَا طَرَائِفَ حِكْمَتِهِ بِفُضُولِ كَلَامِهِ وَ أَطْفَأَ نُورَ عِبْرَتِهِ بِشَهَوَاتِ نَفْسِهِ فَكَأَنَّمَا أَعَانَ هَوَاهُ عَلَى هَدْمِ عَقْلِهِ وَ مَنْ هَدَمَ عَقْلَهُ أَفْسَدَ عَلَيْهِ دِينَهُ وَ دُنْيَاهُ يَا هِشَامُ كَيْفَ يَزْكُو عِنْدَ اللَّهِ عَمَلُكَ وَ أَنْتَ قَدْ شَغَلْتَ قَلْبَكَ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّكَ وَ أَطَعْتَ هَوَاكَ عَلَى غَلَبَةِ عَقْلِكَ يَا هِشَامُ الصَّبْرُ عَلَى الْوَحْدَةِ عَلَامَةُ قُوَّةِ الْعَقْلِ فَمَنْ عَقَلَ عَنِ اللَّهِ اعْتَزَلَ أَهْلَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الرَّاغِبِينَ فِيهَا وَ رَغِبَ فِيمَا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ وَ كَانَ اللَّهُ أُنْسَهُ فِي الْوَحْشَةِ وَ صَاحِبَهُ فِي الْوَحْدَةِ وَ غِنَاهُ فِي الْعَيْلَةِ وَ مُعِزَّهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ عَشِيرَةٍ يَا هِشَامُ نَصْبُ الْحَقِّ لِطَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَ لَا نَجَاةَ إِلَّا بِالطَّاعَةِ وَ الطَّاعَةُ بِالْعِلْمِ وَ الْعِلْمُ بِالتَّعَلُّمِ وَ التَّعَلُّمُ بِالْعَقْلِ يُعْتَقَدُ وَ لَا عِلْمَ إِلَّا مِنْ عَالِمٍ رَبَّانِيٍّ وَ مَعْرِفَةُ الْعِلْمِ بِالْعَقْلِ يَا هِشَامُ قَلِيلُ الْعَمَلِ مِنَ الْعَالِمِ مَقْبُولٌ مُضَاعَفٌ وَ كَثِيرُ الْعَمَلِ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْهَوَى وَ الْجَهْلِ مَرْدُودٌ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعَاقِلَ رَضِيَ بِالدُّونِ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا مَعَ الْحِكْمَةِ وَ لَمْ يَرْضَ بِالدُّونِ مِنَ الْحِكْمَةِ مَعَ الدُّنْيَا فَلِذَلِكَ رَبِحَتْ تِجَارَتُهُمْ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعُقَلَاءَ تَرَكُوا فُضُولَ الدُّنْيَا فَكَيْفَ الذُّنُوبَ وَ تَرْكُ الدُّنْيَا مِنَ الْفَضْلِ وَ تَرْكُ الذُّنُوبِ مِنَ الْفَرْضِ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعَاقِلَ نَظَرَ إِلَى الدُّنْيَا وَ إِلَى أَهْلِهَا فَعَلِمَ أَنَّهَا لَا تُنَالُ إِلَّا بِالْمَشَقَّةِ وَ نَظَرَ إِلَى الْآخِرَةِ فَعَلِمَ أَنَّهَا لَا تُنَالُ إِلَّا بِالْمَشَقَّةِ فَطَلَبَ بِالْمَشَقَّةِ أَبْقَاهُمَا يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعُقَلَاءَ زَهِدُوا فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ رَغِبُوا فِي الْآخِرَةِ لِأَنَّهُمْ عَلِمُوا أَنَّ الدُّنْيَا طَالِبَةٌ مَطْلُوبَةٌ وَ الْآخِرَةَ طَالِبَةٌ وَ مَطْلُوبَةٌ فَمَنْ طَلَبَ الْآخِرَةَ طَلَبَتْهُ الدُّنْيَا حَتَّى يَسْتَوْفِيَ مِنْهَا رِزْقَهُ وَ مَنْ طَلَبَ الدُّنْيَا طَلَبَتْهُ الْآخِرَةُ فَيَأْتِيهِ الْمَوْتُ فَيُفْسِدُ عَلَيْهِ دُنْيَاهُ وَ آخِرَتَهُ يَا هِشَامُ مَنْ أَرَادَ الْغِنَى بِلَا مَالٍ وَ رَاحَةَ الْقَلْبِ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَ السَّلَامَةَ فِي الدِّينِ فَلْيَتَضَرَّعْ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي مَسْأَلَتِهِ بِأَنْ يُكَمِّلَ عَقْلَهُ فَمَنْ عَقَلَ قَنِعَ بِمَا يَكْفِيهِ وَ مَنْ قَنِعَ بِمَا يَكْفِيهِ اسْتَغْنَى وَ مَنْ لَمْ يَقْنَعْ بِمَا يَكْفِيهِ لَمْ يُدْرِكِ الْغِنَى أَبَداً يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ حَكَى عَنْ قَوْمٍ صَالِحِينَ أَنَّهُمْ قَالُوا رَبَّنا لا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنا وَ هَبْ لَنا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ حِينَ عَلِمُوا أَنَّ الْقُلُوبَ تَزِيغُ وَ تَعُودُ إِلَى عَمَاهَا وَ رَدَاهَا إِنَّهُ لَمْ يَخَفِ اللَّهَ مَنْ لَمْ يَعْقِلْ عَنِ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ لَمْ يَعْقِلْ عَنِ اللَّهِ لَمْ يَعْقِدْ قَلْبَهُ عَلَى مَعْرِفَةٍ ثَابِتَةٍ يُبْصِرُهَا وَ يَجِدُ حَقِيقَتَهَا فِي قَلْبِهِ وَ لَا يَكُونُ أَحَدٌ كَذَلِكَ إِلَّا مَنْ كَانَ قَوْلُهُ لِفِعْلِهِ مُصَدِّقاً وَ سِرُّهُ لِعَلَانِيَتِهِ مُوَافِقاً لِأَنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ اسْمُهُ لَمْ يَدُلَّ عَلَى الْبَاطِنِ الْخَفِيِّ مِنَ الْعَقْلِ إِلَّا بِظَاهِرٍ مِنْهُ وَ نَاطِقٍ عَنْهُ يَا هِشَامُ كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَا عُبِدَ اللَّهُ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ أَفْضَلَ مِنَ الْعَقْلِ وَ مَا تَمَّ عَقْلُ امْرِئٍ حَتَّى يَكُونَ فِيهِ خِصَالٌ شَتَّى الْكُفْرُ وَ الشَّرُّ مِنْهُ مَأْمُونَانِ وَ الرُّشْدُ وَ الْخَيْرُ مِنْهُ مَأْمُولَانِ وَ فَضْلُ مَالِهِ مَبْذُولٌ وَ فَضْلُ قَوْلِهِ مَكْفُوفٌ وَ نَصِيبُهُ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا الْقُوتُ لَا يَشْبَعُ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ دَهْرَهُ الذُّلُّ أَحَبُّ إِلَيْهِ مَعَ اللَّهِ مِنَ الْعِزِّ مَعَ غَيْرِهِ وَ التَّوَاضُعُ أَحَبُّ إِلَيْهِ مِنَ الشَّرَفِ يَسْتَكْثِرُ قَلِيلَ الْمَعْرُوفِ مِنْ غَيْرِهِ وَ يَسْتَقِلُّ كَثِيرَ الْمَعْرُوفِ مِنْ نَفْسِهِ وَ يَرَى النَّاسَ كُلَّهُمْ خَيْراً مِنْهُ وَ أَنَّهُ شَرُّهُمْ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَ هُوَ تَمَامُ الْأَمْرِ يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعَاقِلَ لَا يَكْذِبُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ فِيهِ هَوَاهُ يَا هِشَامُ لَا دِينَ لِمَنْ لَا مُرُوَّةَ لَهُ وَ لَا مُرُوَّةَ لِمَنْ لَا عَقْلَ لَهُ وَ إِنَّ أَعْظَمَ النَّاسِ قَدْراً الَّذِي لَا يَرَى الدُّنْيَا لِنَفْسِهِ خَطَراً أَمَا إِنَّ أَبْدَانَكُمْ لَيْسَ لَهَا ثَمَنٌ إِلَّا الْجَنَّةُ فَلَا تَبِيعُوهَا بِغَيْرِهَا يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ يَقُولُ إِنَّ مِنْ عَلَامَةِ الْعَاقِلِ أَنْ يَكُونَ فِيهِ ثَلَاثُ خِصَالٍ يُجِيبُ إِذَا سُئِلَ وَ يَنْطِقُ إِذَا عَجَزَ الْقَوْمُ عَنِ الْكَلَامِ وَ يُشِيرُ بِالرَّأْيِ الَّذِي يَكُونُ فِيهِ صَلَاحُ أَهْلِهِ فَمَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ مِنْ هَذِهِ الْخِصَالِ الثَّلَاثِ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَهُوَ أَحْمَقُ إِنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَا يَجْلِسُ فِي صَدْرِ الْمَجْلِسِ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ فِيهِ هَذِهِ الْخِصَالُ الثَّلَاثُ أَوْ وَاحِدَةٌ مِنْهُنَّ فَمَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنْهُنَّ فَجَلَسَ فَهُوَ أَحْمَقُ وَ قَالَ الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )إِذَا طَلَبْتُمُ الْحَوَائِجَ فَاطْلُبُوهَا مِنْ أَهْلِهَا قِيلَ يَا ابْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ أَهْلُهَا قَالَ الَّذِينَ قَصَّ اللَّهُ فِي كِتَابِهِ وَ ذَكَرَهُمْ فَقَالَ إِنَّما يَتَذَكَّرُ أُولُوا الْأَلْبابِ قَالَ هُمْ أُولُو الْعُقُولِ وَ قَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) مُجَالَسَةُ الصَّالِحِينَ دَاعِيَةٌ إِلَى الصَّلَاحِ وَ آدَابُ الْعُلَمَاءِ زِيَادَةٌ فِي الْعَقْلِ وَ طَاعَةُ وُلَاةِ الْعَدْلِ تَمَامُ الْعِزِّ وَ اسْتِثْمَارُ الْمَالِ تَمَامُ الْمُرُوءَةِ وَ إِرْشَادُ الْمُسْتَشِيرِ قَضَاءٌ لِحَقِّ النِّعْمَةِ وَ كَفُّ الْأَذَى مِنْ كَمَالِ الْعَقْلِ وَ فِيهِ رَاحَةُ الْبَدَنِ عَاجِلًا وَ آجِلًا يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ الْعَاقِلَ لَا يُحَدِّثُ مَنْ يَخَافُ تَكْذِيبَهُ وَ لَا يَسْأَلُ مَنْ يَخَافُ مَنْعَهُ وَ لَا يَعِدُ مَا لَا يَقْدِرُ عَلَيْهِ وَ لَا يَرْجُو مَا يُعَنَّفُ بِرَجَائِهِ وَ لَا يُقْدِمُ عَلَى مَا يَخَافُ فَوْتَهُ بِالْعَجْزِ عَنْهُ .

narrators.name_en: Abu al-Hasan Musa ibn Ja'far (Imam al-Kadhim)

related_quran.note: Give glad tidings to My servants
Those who listen and follow the best
Your God is One God
Signs in creation of heavens and earth
He spread the earth
Adjacent tracts of land
He grows for you crops
He subjected the night and day
What He created for you on earth
He subjected the sea
He cast mountains on earth
Landmarks and by the stars
Is He who creates like one who does not?
He made for you the stars
Had we listened or reasoned
Parables for people, only the learned understand
Do not set up another god
Worship none but Him, be good to parents
We gave Luqman wisdom
He gives wisdom to whom He wills
Do not follow what you have no knowledge of
The worst of creatures are the deaf and dumb
Do they not ponder the Quran?
Signs in creation of heavens and earth
Those who remember Allah standing, sitting
One who worships during the night
Servants of the Most Merciful walk humbly
Do not walk arrogantly on earth
Do not turn your face from people
Do not make your hand chained to your neck
Those who spend neither extravagantly nor miserly
Eat and drink but do not waste
Say: if you possessed the treasures
At the Lote-tree of the utmost boundary

seo_questions.bn: ইমাম মুসা আল-কাযিম ইসলামে বুদ্ধির গুরুত্ব সম্পর্কে কী শিক্ষা দেন?
seo_questions.de: Was lehrt Imam Musa al-Kadhim über die Bedeutung des Intellekts im Islam?
seo_questions.en: What does Imam Musa al-Kadhim teach about the importance of intellect in Islam?
seo_questions.es: ¿Qué enseña el Imam Musa al-Kadhim sobre la importancia del intelecto en el Islam?
seo_questions.fa: امام موسی کاظم (ع) درباره اهمیت عقل در اسلام چه می‌فرمایند؟
seo_questions.fr: Qu'enseigne l'Imam Moussa al-Kadhim sur l'importance de l'intellect en Islam?
seo_questions.id: Apa yang diajarkan Imam Musa al-Kazhim tentang pentingnya akal dalam Islam?
seo_questions.ru: Чему учит имам Муса аль-Казим о важности разума в исламе?
seo_questions.tr: İmam Musa el-Kazım İslam'da aklın önemini nasıl anlatır?
seo_questions.ur: امام موسیٰ الکاظم (ع) اسلام میں عقل کی اہمیت کے بارے میں کیا فرماتے ہیں؟
seo_questions.zh: 伊玛目穆萨·卡齐姆关于理智在伊斯兰中的重要性有何教导？

similar_content_hints.description: Hadith of the Armies of Intellect and Ignorance (al-Kafi 1:1:1:14) - listing 75 soldiers of intellect vs ignorance
Imam Ali's sermon on the importance of knowledge and intellect in Nahj al-Balagha
Hadith of Unwan al-Basri from Imam al-Sadiq on conditions of seeking knowledge

summaries.bn: এটি বিখ্যাত হিশামের হাদিস, ইমাম মুসা আল-কাযিম (আ.) থেকে হিশাম ইবনে আল-হাকামের প্রতি ইসলামে বুদ্ধির গুরুত্ব সম্পর্কে একটি ব্যাপক উপদেশ। ইমাম ৩০টিরও বেশি কুরআনের আয়াত উদ্ধৃত করেন।
summaries.de: Dies ist der berühmte Hadith von Hisham, eine umfassende Ermahnung von Imam Musa al-Kadhim (AS) an Hisham ibn al-Hakam über die überragende Bedeutung des Intellekts im Islam. Der Imam zitiert über 30 koranische Verse.
summaries.en: This is the famous Hadith of Hisham, a comprehensive exhortation from Imam Musa al-Kadhim (AS) to Hisham ibn al-Hakam about the supreme importance of intellect ('aql) in Islam. The Imam cites over 30 Quranic verses to demonstrate that Allah addresses the people of intellect and understanding, condemning those who do not reason. The hadith covers the role of intellect in knowing Allah, the characteristics of the wise versus the foolish, the relationship between intellect and worship, the three destroyers of the soul (greed, vanity, envy), the metaphor of the wise merchant, and the signs of magnanimity and truthfulness. It is one of the longest and most theologically rich hadiths in Usul al-Kafi.
summaries.es: Este es el famoso Hadiz de Hisham, una exhortación integral del Imam Musa al-Kadhim (AS) a Hisham ibn al-Hakam sobre la suprema importancia del intelecto en el Islam. El Imam cita más de 30 versículos coránicos.
summaries.fa: این حدیث مشهور هشام، نصیحت جامع امام موسی کاظم (ع) به هشام بن حکم درباره اهمیت والای عقل در اسلام است. امام بیش از 30 آیه قرآنی را نقل می‌کند تا نشان دهد خداوند اهل عقل و فهم را مورد خطاب قرار می‌دهد.
summaries.fr: C'est le célèbre Hadith de Hisham, une exhortation complète de l'Imam Moussa al-Kadhim (AS) à Hisham ibn al-Hakam sur l'importance suprême de l'intellect en Islam. L'Imam cite plus de 30 versets coraniques.
summaries.id: Ini adalah Hadis Hisyam yang terkenal, nasihat komprehensif dari Imam Musa al-Kazhim (AS) kepada Hisyam ibn al-Hakam tentang pentingnya akal dalam Islam. Imam mengutip lebih dari 30 ayat Al-Quran untuk menunjukkan bahwa Allah menyeru kepada orang-orang berakal.
summaries.ru: Это знаменитый хадис Хишама — всеобъемлющее наставление имама Мусы аль-Казима (мир ему) Хишаму ибн аль-Хакаму о высшей важности разума в исламе. Имам приводит более 30 аятов Корана.
summaries.tr: Bu, İmam Musa el-Kazım'ın (AS) Hişam bin el-Hakem'e aklın İslam'daki üstün önemini anlattığı meşhur Hişam Hadisi'dir. İmam, Allah'ın akıl ve anlayış sahiplerine hitap ettiğini göstermek için 30'dan fazla Kur'an ayeti aktarır.
summaries.ur: یہ مشہور حدیث ہشام ہے، جو امام موسیٰ الکاظم (ع) کی جانب سے ہشام بن الحکم کو عقل کی اسلام میں اہمیت کے بارے میں ایک جامع نصیحت ہے۔ امام نے 30 سے زیادہ قرآنی آیات پیش کیں تاکہ ثابت ہو کہ اللہ تعالیٰ عقل و فہم والوں سے خطاب کرتا ہے۔
